task_completion.description: Survey titled 'TechInnovate 2026 Lead Capture' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey overview, top navigation bar, or survey list page displays the title 'TechInnovate 2026 Lead Capture'.

task_completion.description: Group 'Attendee Details' contains 'Name' and 'Email' text questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The survey structure tree or question list shows a group named 'Attendee Details' containing two questions titled 'Name' and 'Email' (both set to a text input type like 'Short free text').

task_completion.description: Hidden Equation question 'CaptureTime' is configured with the correct date formula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Question settings for 'CaptureTime' show the question type is 'Equation', the 'Always hide this question' setting is enabled (On), and the equation text contains '{date("Y-m-d H:i:s")}'.

task_completion.description: IP saving, cookies, and save/resume options are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings (Participant settings, Data policy, or similar), the toggles/dropdowns for 'Save IP address', 'Use cookies to prevent repeated participation', and 'Participant may save and resume later' are set to 'Off' or 'No'.

task_completion.description: Automatic URL loading is enabled and End URL is set to the survey's own link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Text elements or Presentation settings, 'Automatically load URL when survey complete' is turned On, and the 'End URL' field contains the survey's own public link (a URL containing the survey ID).
The survey overview shows an 'Active' status badge, or the 'Stop this survey' / 'Deactivate' button is visible, indicating the survey has been successfully activated.

integrity.description: Agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Settings were applied in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into genuine LimeSurvey form fields. There is no evidence of a text editor or browser developer tools being used to fake the visual output.

integrity.description: The End URL is a real survey link, not a literal copy-paste of the task description instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The End URL field contains a valid URL format (e.g., starting with http:// or https:// and containing the survey ID), not literal placeholder text like 'the survey's own public link'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey title must be exactly 'TechInnovate 2026 Lead Capture'. The question group must be 'Attendee Details'. The hidden question code must be 'CaptureTime' and its formula must use the ExpressionScript syntax '{date("Y-m-d H:i:s")}'. The environment is LimeSurvey 6.
